notes: aud "https://storage.example/alice" is a string prefix of the target "https://storage.example/aliceevil/x.txt" but does not logically contain it. Same trap class as realm-segment-prefix-trap-rejected.

title: audience containment is logical (path-segment) containment: a string-prefix aud does not contain a sibling storage
